channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Netflix's New #1 Mystery Thriller Is Taking Over The World

item.description: Aaron Carter’s mom is embroiled in a legal battle with the late pop star’s ex-fiancée, Melanie Martin, over what she claims are "illegal withdrawals" ...

item.title: Restraining Order Against Jada Pinkett Smith Denied, Filed by Will Smith's Alleged Pal
item.description: A Los Angeles judge denied a restraining order petition filed against Jada Pinkett Smith by Will Smith’s alleged friend ... TMZ has learned. According...

item.title: Cops Called to Shia LaBeouf's Louisiana Home for Alleged Fight Between Exes
item.description: Cops were called out to Shia LaBeouf's New Orleans home a few times prior to his Mardi Gras arrest -- including once for an alleged fight between exes...

item.title: Everything You Need to Survive Mercury in Retrograde
item.description: TMZ may collect a share of sales or other compensation from links on this page. Missed flights, mixed signals and mysterious mood swings got you down?...

item.title: Eddie Huang In 'Fresh Off The Boat' 'Memba Him?!
item.description: American actor Hudson Yang was only a pre-teen when he first started playing Eddie -- the hip-hop-lovin' kid who loves 90s rap -- on the sitcom series...
